2024.tagline: Portugal's Scorching Summer: Blaze and Freeze
narrative: The summer of 2024 saw Portugal ravaged by a series of extreme temperature fluctuations, culminating in devastating wildfires that left a trail of destruction and loss of life. The heatwaves, which peaked at temperatures above 45°C (113°F), preceded the inferno that burned across the country, claiming 947 lives and causing estimated damages of $520,000,000. The nation mourned the loss of its people and properties, while the world watched in horror as the country struggled to recover from the dual disasters.
